text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The Goddess of Victory might not have blessed
me with her smile today...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But everyone had lots of fun, and that's good
enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if that means I was able to bring some
extra sparkle to the stage.
choice_data_list:
You're always radiant, and today's no
exception.

You're always radiant, and today's no
exception.
Let's make the next one the best show ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if that means I was able to bring some
extra sparkle to the stage.
choice_data_list:
You're always radiant, and today's no
exception.

You're always radiant, and today's no
exception.
Let's make the next one the best show ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Is that how you see me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As an entertainer, I can't afford to be outshone
by anyone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right. I'll show everyone a good time at my next
race too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'm not satisfied with my
performance today either.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's expecting much more than this from
me, and I'll have to work harder to meet those
expectations!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait, everyone! I'll only get stronger from
here on out!
